scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required elements: HTTP health check with correct fields (period, timeout, threshold, level, http.url), environment variables, and log target with correct Loki type and location format. Uses override:replace on checks. Includes on-check-failure equivalent via level:alive. Slightly more elaborate than gold standard but all core facts match.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issues: 'summary' and 'description' fields on services/checks may not be standard Pebble layer spec fields. 'after' and 'requires' service dependencies are valid. 'kill-delay' is a valid Pebble field. 'user'/'group' are valid. The 'services' field in log-targets uses list syntax rather than bracketed array — both are valid YAML. Missing explicit 'on-check-failure' linking checks to service restart actions (gold standard shows this pattern), though level:alive partially covers restart behavior. Overall minor rather than invented APIs.
